.css-7gy33x h2 span:hover{color:#595959;} .css-1jbw2er{display:block;font-family:FreightSansW01,Helvetica,Arial,Sans-serif;font-weight:100;margin-bottom:0;margin-top:0;-webkit-text-decoration:none;text-decoration:none;}@media (any-hover: hover){.css-1jbw2er:hover{color:link-hover;}}@media(max-width: 48rem){.css-1jbw2er{font-size:1.05rem;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:1rem;padding-right:1rem;}}@media(min-width: 48rem){.css-1jbw2er{font-size:0.85732rem;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:0.5rem;}}@media(min-width: 64rem){.css-1jbw2er{font-size:1.00828rem;line-height:1.2;}}.css-1jbw2er a:hover{color:#595959;}.css-1jbw2er h2 span:hover{color:#595959;} The Popular Mechanics Guide to AI Music Generators - Popular Mechanics

.css-ftsoqv{display:block;margin-bottom:0.625rem;}.css-ftsoqv img{vertical-align:top;} .css-uhlbpv{background-color:#ffffff;color:#000;padding:0.9375rem;padding-bottom:1.875rem;text-align:left;}.css-uhlbpv h2 span:hover{color:#595959;} .css-v1xtj3{display:block;font-family:FreightSansW01,Helvetica,Arial,Sans-serif;font-weight:100;margin-bottom:0;margin-top:0;-webkit-text-decoration:none;text-decoration:none;}@media (any-hover: hover){.css-v1xtj3:hover{color:link-hover;}}@media(max-width: 48rem){.css-v1xtj3{font-size:1.1387rem;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:1rem;margin-top:0.625rem;}}@media(min-width: 40.625rem){.css-v1xtj3{line-height:1.2;}}@media(min-width: 48rem){.css-v1xtj3{font-size:1.18581rem;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:0.5rem;margin-top:0rem;}}@media(min-width: 64rem){.css-v1xtj3{font-size:1.23488rem;line-height:1.2;margin-top:0.9375rem;}} JWST May Have Finally Found The First-Ever Stars - Popular Mechanics

.css-dpp89d{background-color:#000000;color:#ffffff;display:block;font-family:FreightSansW01,Helvetica,Arial,Sans-serif;font-weight:bold;margin:0rem;padding:0.6rem 1.25rem;}@media(max-width: 48rem){.css-dpp89d{font-size:1.54339rem;line-height:1.2;padding:1.25rem 1.25rem;}}@media(min-width: 48rem){.css-dpp89d{font-size:2.3625rem;line-height:1.2;padding:0.625rem;}}@media(min-width: 64rem){.css-dpp89d{font-size:2.66808rem;line-height:1.2;padding:1.875rem 4.375rem;}}.css-dpp89d:hover{color:#E8E8E8;-webkit-transition:color 0.3s ease-in-out;transition:color 0.3s ease-in-out;}.css-dpp89d h2 span{padding:0rem;} Can We Contain AI Before We Reach Singularity? - Popular Mechanics
